name: replicate
description: Replicate predictions API — open-weight LLMs hosted as versioned models. Each model is identified as `owner/name:version`; the Replicate codec wraps OpenAI-canonical chat into the prediction `{version, input}` envelope. Model list per 2026-04 vendor docs; admin should pin specific versions and verify availability against https://replicate.com/explore before customer-facing use.

models.name: Llama 3 70B Instruct
models.description: Meta's Llama 3 70B Instruct on Replicate. Pin a specific version hash via the Provider config before promoting to production.

models.name: Llama 3 8B Instruct
models.description: Smaller Llama 3 8B Instruct for low-cost workloads.
